use_cases: Form submission triggers for login, signup, and contact forms
Call-to-action buttons in marketing pages and landing sections
Navigation actions like cancel, back, and next steps
Destructive action confirmations with variant styling
ai_summary: A reusable Button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes using Radix UI's Slot for composition and class-variance-authority for variant management. Features standard hover and focus states with subtle shadow effects. Designed as an atomic component for consistent button styling across applications.
